App.Title: Connect The Dots - Quran Memorization Management
App.Description: A comprehensive platform for managing Quran memorization, tracking student progress, and empowering teachers with meaningful insights.
App.OpenGraphAlt: Connect The Dots - Quran Memorization Management

Hero.title: Connect The Dots
Hero.subtitle: Nurture Quran memorization with confidence. A comprehensive platform for parents, Quran circles, and schools to track progress, evaluate recitation, and celebrate every milestone.
Hero.quranVerse: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا الْقُرْآنَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
Hero.quranVerseTranslation: Indeed, We have made the Quran easy to remember. Is there anyone who will be mindful?
Hero.appsNote: Two dedicated apps — one for Students, one for Teachers

Apps.title: Two Dedicated Apps, One Unified Platform
Apps.description: Connect The Dots provides a dedicated app for students and a separate app for teachers — each designed with the right tools for the right role.
Apps.studentAppDesc: A focused experience for students to track their Quran memorization journey and for parents to stay connected. View assignments, track daily progress, review evaluations, and celebrate milestones — all in one place.
Apps.teacherAppDesc: A powerful management tool for teachers and administrators. Create classes, manage students, evaluate recitation, schedule sessions, track attendance, and generate comprehensive reports.
Apps.sharedNote: Both apps share the same platform — data entered by teachers is instantly visible to students and parents, keeping everyone connected in real time.

Audience.title: Built for Everyone in the Quran Journey
Audience.description: Whether you're a parent, a Halaqah teacher, or a school administrator, Connect The Dots adapts to your needs.
Audience.parentsDesc: Stay connected to your child's Quran memorization journey. Track progress, view teacher evaluations, and celebrate milestones together from the comfort of your home.
Audience.halaqatDesc: Manage your mosque circle or community Quran group with ease. Schedule sessions, assign portions, evaluate students, and keep parents informed.
Audience.schoolsDesc: Full institutional management for Quran schools and academies. Multi-class support, advanced analytics, administrative tools, and comprehensive reporting.

Features.title: Everything You Need for Quran Education
Features.description: A complete toolkit designed to support the entire Quran memorization journey from start to completion.
Features.quranStructureDesc: Complete Quran database with all 114 Surahs organized by Juz, Hizb, and Rub' for precise tracking and assignment.
Features.memorizationDesc: Assign Quran portions to students and monitor daily and weekly Hifz and Muraja'ah progress with detailed logs.
Features.evaluationDesc: Teachers can evaluate recitation quality, assign performance levels, and provide constructive feedback to students.
Features.sessionsDesc: Organize learning into structured cycles of 4-6 weeks with attendance tracking and session management.
Features.reportsDesc: Generate detailed progress summaries and analytics for students, teachers, classes, and the entire institution.
Features.multiRoleDesc: Tailored interfaces for students, teachers, parents, and administrators with role-specific dashboards.
Features.parentPortalDesc: Dedicated portal for parents to monitor their children's progress, view evaluations, and stay engaged.
Features.attendanceDesc: Track student attendance across sessions and generate attendance reports for better accountability.
Features.assignmentsDesc: Create and manage memorization assignments with flexible portion selection and deadline tracking.

HowItWorks.title: Simple Steps to Get Started
HowItWorks.description: Begin your Quran memorization management journey in just a few simple steps.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up and choose the plan that fits your needs — whether you're a parent, circle leader, or school administrator.
HowItWorks.step2Title: Set Up Your Circle or School
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Add classes, register students and teachers, and configure your academic structure.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Assign Quran portions, monitor daily progress, evaluate recitation quality, and provide meaningful feedback.
HowItWorks.step4Desc: Generate comprehensive reports, track growth over time, and celebrate every memorization milestone.

Benefits.title: Why Choose Connect The Dots?
Benefits.description: Built with deep understanding of Quran education needs and the communities that nurture it.
Benefits.structuredDesc: Organized progression through the Quran with clear milestones, goals, and measurable outcomes.
Benefits.timeSavingDesc: Automate tracking and reporting so teachers can focus on what matters most — teaching and mentoring.
Benefits.consistencyDesc: Daily tracking and scheduled reviews build lasting memorization habits for lifelong retention.
Benefits.scalableDesc: From individual families to small mosque circles to large Quran schools and online programs.
Benefits.paperlessDesc: Digital records replace manual registers, making data accessible anywhere, anytime.
Benefits.parentEngagementDesc: Parents stay informed and involved in their children's Quran memorization progress and achievements.

Pricing.title: Choose the Plan That Fits You
Pricing.description: Simple, transparent pricing for every stage. Choose the plan that fits your needs.
Pricing.parentsDesc: Perfect for individual families tracking their children's Quran memorization.
Pricing.halaqatDesc: Ideal for mosque circles and community Quran groups.
Pricing.schoolsDesc: Full-featured solution for Quran schools and academies.

Testimonials.title: Trusted by the Quran Community
Testimonials.description: Hear from educators and parents who use Connect The Dots.
Testimonials.t1Quote: Connect The Dots transformed how I manage my Halaqah. I can now track every student's progress and share reports with parents effortlessly.
Testimonials.t2Quote: As a parent, I love being able to see my son's memorization progress. It keeps us motivated and connected to his journey.
Testimonials.t3Quote: Managing our Quran school has never been easier. The analytics and reporting tools save us hours every week.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Find answers to common questions about Connect The Dots.
FAQ.a1: Connect The Dots is a comprehensive platform for managing Quran memorization (Hifz). It helps parents, Quran circle teachers, and school administrators track student progress, evaluate recitation, schedule sessions, and generate insightful reports.
FAQ.a2: Yes! Our Parents plan is completely free and lets you track up to 5 students. For Quran circles and schools that need more features, we offer affordable paid plans.
FAQ.q3: Can parents see their child's progress?
FAQ.a3: Absolutely. Parents have a dedicated portal where they can view their child's memorization progress, teacher evaluations, feedback, and milestone achievements in real time.
FAQ.q4: How does the evaluation system work?
FAQ.a4: Teachers can evaluate student recitation on multiple criteria including accuracy, Tajweed, fluency, and memorization strength. Each evaluation includes a performance level and optional written feedback.
FAQ.q5: Can I use it for online Quran classes?
FAQ.a5: Yes! Connect The Dots works perfectly for both in-person and online Quran education. Teachers can assign portions, track progress, and evaluate students regardless of location.
FAQ.q6: What Quran structure does it support?
FAQ.a6: The platform includes the complete Quran database with all 114 Surahs organized by Juz (30), Hizb (60), and Rub' (240), allowing precise tracking at any level of granularity.

Hero.title: Our Mission: Making Quran Education Accessible
Hero.description: We believe every Muslim deserves access to structured, effective Quran memorization tools — regardless of location, language, or resources.

Mission.title: What Drives Us
Mission.description: Connect The Dots was born from a simple observation: Quran teachers spend too much time on paperwork and not enough time teaching. We're here to change that.
Mission.sincerityDesc: Everything we build is rooted in sincere intention to serve the Quran and its students.
Mission.excellenceDesc: We strive for the highest quality in every feature, following the Prophetic tradition of excellence in work.
Mission.communityDesc: We build for the global Muslim community — parents, teachers, students, and institutions worldwide.
Mission.innovationDesc: We combine modern technology with timeless Quran education methods to create something truly useful.

Story.title: Our Story
Story.p1: Connect The Dots started when a group of Quran educators realized that managing student progress with paper registers and spreadsheets was holding back both teachers and students.
Story.p2: We saw teachers spending evenings updating records instead of preparing lessons. Parents asking for progress updates that took days to compile. Schools unable to track institution-wide performance.
Story.p3: So we built Connect The Dots — a platform that handles the administrative burden so educators can focus on what they do best: teaching the Book of Allah.
Story.p4: Today, Connect The Dots serves parents, Quran circles, and schools, providing each with the exact tools they need to nurture Quran memorization with confidence and clarity.

Hero.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
Hero.description: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Start free, upgrade as you grow.

FAQ.title: Pricing FAQ
FAQ.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
FAQ.q2: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
FAQ.a2: Yes! All paid plans come with a 14-day free trial so you can explore all features before committing.
FAQ.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
FAQ.a3: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and select regional payment methods. All payments are processed securely.
FAQ.q4: Can I get a discount for annual billing?
FAQ.a4: Yes, annual billing gives you 2 months free on any paid plan. That's a 17% discount compared to monthly billing.

Hero.title: Powerful Tools for Quran Education
Hero.description: Discover everything Connect The Dots offers to streamline Quran memorization management for parents, teachers, and institutions.

Detail.quranStructureDetail: Access the complete Quran database with all 114 Surahs organized by Juz (30), Hizb (60), and Rub' (240). Assign specific portions with precision, track progress at any level of granularity, and navigate the Quran structure effortlessly within the platform.
Detail.memorizationDetail: Assign daily and weekly Hifz (memorization) and Muraja'ah (review) portions to students. Monitor progress through detailed logs, view completion percentages, and ensure students maintain a balanced memorization and review schedule.
Detail.evaluationDetail: Evaluate student recitation on multiple criteria including accuracy, Tajweed rules, fluency, and memorization strength. Assign performance levels, provide written feedback, and build a comprehensive evaluation history for every student.
Detail.sessionsDetail: Organize learning into structured cycles of 4-6 weeks. Schedule sessions, manage class timetables, track attendance per session, and maintain a clear academic calendar for your circle or school.
Detail.reportsDetail: Generate comprehensive progress reports for individual students, teachers, classes, or the entire institution. View analytics dashboards, track trends over time, and export reports for parents, board meetings, or accreditation purposes.
Detail.multiRoleDetail: Every user gets a tailored experience. Students see their assignments and progress. Teachers manage their classes and evaluations. Parents monitor their children. Administrators oversee the entire institution with full control.
Detail.parentPortalDetail: A dedicated space for parents to stay connected to their child's Quran education. View daily progress, read teacher evaluations and feedback, track milestone achievements, and receive notifications — all without needing to contact the teacher directly.
Detail.attendanceDetail: Track student attendance across all sessions with a simple interface. Generate attendance reports, identify patterns of absence, and maintain accurate records for accountability and communication with parents.
Detail.assignmentsDetail: Create memorization assignments with flexible Surah and Ayah selection. Set deadlines, specify review requirements, and track completion status. Students receive clear assignments while teachers maintain full oversight of the class workload.

WhoItsFor.title: Who It's For - Connect The Dots

Hero.title: Built for Every Part of the Quran Journey
Hero.description: Whether you're a parent nurturing your child's memorization, a teacher guiding a Halaqah, or an administrator managing a Quran school — Connect The Dots is designed for you.

Detail.schoolsF3: Advanced analytics and custom report generation

Terms.title: Terms of Service - Connect The Dots
Terms.heading: Terms of Service
Terms.s1Content: By accessing or using Connect The Dots ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Platform. These terms apply to all users, including parents, teachers, administrators, and students.
Terms.s2Content: Connect The Dots is a Quran memorization management platform that provides tools for tracking student progress, evaluating recitation, scheduling sessions, and generating reports. The Platform is designed for parents, Quran circles (Halaqat), and schools/institutes.
Terms.s3Content: You must create an account to use the Platform. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must provide accurate and complete information when creating your account and keep it up to date.
Terms.s4Content: You agree to use the Platform only for its intended purpose of Quran education management. You shall not misuse the Platform, attempt to gain unauthorized access, interfere with other users' accounts, or use the Platform for any unlawful purpose. You are responsible for all content you submit to the Platform.
Terms.s5Content: The Platform offers different subscription plans (Parents, Quran Circle, School/Institute). Paid plans are billed monthly or annually. You may cancel your subscription at any time, and cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis.
Terms.s6Content: Your use of the Platform is also governed by our Privacy Policy. We are committed to protecting the data of all users, especially student information. We do not sell personal data to third parties. Please review our Privacy Policy for detailed information about how we collect, use, and protect your data.
Terms.s7Content: All content, features, and functionality of the Platform — including design, text, graphics, logos, and software — are owned by Connect The Dots and are protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works from any part of the Platform without prior written consent.
Terms.s8Content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Your continued use of the Platform after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the modified terms. We encourage you to review these terms periodically.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy - Connect The Dots
Privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
Privacy.s1Content: We collect information you provide when creating an account (name, email address, role), information about students (names, progress data, evaluations), and usage data (how you interact with the Platform). We do not collect unnecessary personal information and minimize data collection to what is required for the Platform to function.
Privacy.s2Content: We use your information to provide and improve the Platform's services, including tracking Quran memorization progress, generating reports, facilitating communication between teachers and parents, and personalizing your experience. We may also use anonymized, aggregated data for analytics and service improvement.
Privacy.s3Content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit and at rest, secure authentication, and regular security audits. Student data is treated with the highest level of care and protection, and access is restricted to authorized users only.
Privacy.s4Content: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. We may share data with service providers who assist in operating the Platform (such as hosting and analytics), but only under strict confidentiality agreements. We may disclose information if required by law.
Privacy.s5Content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can export your data, request account deletion, and opt out of non-essential communications. Parents have full control over their children's data and can request its removal at any time.
Privacy.s6Content: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and preferences (such as language settings). We do not use tracking cookies for advertising purposes. Any analytics we perform use anonymized data to help us improve the Platform experience.
Privacy.s7Content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically. Your continued use of the Platform after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
